description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the nixos/nix:2.2.1 Docker image and defines a single stage called build. Add a before_script that runs `nix-channel --add https://nixos.org/channels/nixos-19.03 nixos-19.03`, then `nix-channel --list`, and finally `nix-channel --update`. In the build stage add a job named build-nixpkgs-known that executes `nix-build --max-jobs 4 ./default.nix`. No caches, artifacts, services, or special rules are required.
